title: auth.user.deletion_requested v1
description: Emitted by the auth service when a GDPR/ARCO erasure DSR (right to be forgotten) is completed. Consumed by the conversational module to anonymize all conversation and memory data associated with the user.

user_id.description: UUID of the user whose data must be anonymized. Consumers read payload.get('user_id') to identify the scope of deletion.
